allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\cv" -Exclude ".venv" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false } | Select-Object @{Name="Path";Expression={$_.FullName}}, @{Name="Size";Expression={$_.Length}}, @{Name="Type";Expression={$_.Extension}} | Sort-Object Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "E:\\cv" -Depth 2 -Exclude ".venv" | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
